title: Optimized Realism
description: Optimized graphical and audio realism designed for vanilla servers!
body:
_So, you want graphical & audio realism? You also want optimization? Oh, you also want to play on vanilla servers? And you want your favorite QoL mods too? And you don't want to spend time configuring, just plug and play? For free?_

Damn. That's a lot to ask for. Well, we made it anyway.

# Introducing Optimized Realism!

**The all-in-one optimized graphical & audio realism modpack specially designed for vanilla servers!**

Features:
- High-Quality Graphical Realism
- Immersive & Dynamic audio realism
- Realistic yet unobtrusive physics
- Optimized Performance
- Pre-configured for plug & play
- Your favorite QoL mods
- Customizable
- Optional RPG-style third-person mode
- Various polishes with animations and UI reworks (you can remove if you dislike)
